# Examples using n8n's HTTP Request node <a href="#examples-using-n8ns-http-request-node" id="examples-using-n8ns-http-request-node"></a>

The HTTP Request node is one of the most versatile nodes in n8n. Use this node to make HTTP requests to query data from any app or service with a REST API.

Refer to [HTTP Request](https://app.gitbook.com/s/BKcbOzIWja8NfqKDcqHc/builtin/core-nodes/n8n-nodes-base.httprequest) for information on node settings.
